summary: WM Finance iteration 4 testing completed. Backend APIs achieved 100% success rate (16/16 tests passed). All P0/P1 analytics features working correctly: Balance, Expense Analysis, Profitability, Top Contractors widget, Auto Rules. Frontend pages render correctly with proper data-testid elements. Minor UI issue: AI Chat button click is intercepted by Emergent badge overlay.

ui_bugs.issue: AI Chat button click is intercepted by 'Made with Emergent' badge overlay at bottom-right of screen
ui_bugs.suggested_fix: Move AI Chat button from 'right-24' to 'right-6' or higher z-index

issues: Console warnings: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Recharts library sizing issue during initial render

passed_tests: Backend API: /api/analytics/balance - returns correct assets/liabilities structure
Backend API: /api/analytics/expense-analysis - returns expense data with categories and trends
Backend API: /api/analytics/profitability - returns profitability by business directions
Backend API: /api/ai/chat - AI endpoint responds correctly
Frontend: Dashboard loads with all widgets including Top Contractors
Frontend: /analytics/balance page - Shows Assets, Liabilities, Receivables, Net Worth cards
Frontend: /analytics/expenses page - Shows Total Expense, Daily Average, Transaction Count, Expense Trend
Frontend: /analytics/profitability page - Shows Income, Expense, Profit, Margin with direction breakdown
Frontend: /settings/rules page - Auto rules table with add/edit/delete functionality
Frontend: Navigation between all pages works correctly
action_items: Fix AI Chat button position to avoid overlap with Emergent badge (change 'right-24' to 'right-6' in AIChat.jsx)
critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about chart sizing should be addressed by adding minWidth/minHeight to ResponsiveContainer components
DialogContent in AutoRulesPage missing Description or aria-describedby for accessibility
seed_data_creation: Test users created during automated testing with unique emails
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0/P1 analytics features are working. Backend APIs fully functional. Frontend pages load correctly. Only issue is AI Chat button being blocked by Emergent badge - requires minor CSS positioning fix.

test_credentials.note: Can also register new users via /api/auth/register
